productDisplayName: Puma Women BodyTrain Mesh Grid Black Sports Shoes
description: These BodyTrain Mesh Grid sports shoes from puma are designed to maximise your exercise results. Soft padding inside gives your foot a comfortable ride, but it's the curved sole which is the star player. Engineered to tone your legs while you walk, these shoes activate leg muscles you didn't know you had!UpperHeavily meshed upper with synthetic overlays for maximum breathabilityLace-ups for a snug FitPadded collar and tongue for greater comfortEver Foam textile lining for extra padded comfortBrand name and cat logo on the tonguePadded foot-bed, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleEco Ortholite midsole gives breathable comfort, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning, plus being made of a new environmentally friendly materialOutsoleTPR outsole that is ergonomically curved and has waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and tractionBioRide technology in the forefoot and EverTrack technology in the back-foot for best resultsshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
